summary: Complete testing of Monthly Employee Schedule System. All 10 features verified working correctly. Backend: 13/13 tests passed for schedule CRUD, assignment updates, and status changes. Frontend: MonthBar renders with 5 month pills, schedule status badge shows correctly (مسودة/نشط/مؤرشف), create/clone/approve/delete buttons appear correctly based on schedule state, rest days displayed as clickable pill buttons in editable mode.

backend_api.get_employees_planning: PASS - 14 employees found in planning dept
backend_api.get_schedule_march: PASS - Schedule found with status=draft, 14 assignments
backend_api.create_schedule_empty: PASS - Creates draft schedule with employee assignments
backend_api.create_schedule_clone: PASS - Clones assignments from previous month
backend_api.update_assignment_rest_days: PASS - Updates rest_days array for employee
backend_api.approve_schedule: PASS - Changes status from draft to active
backend_api.cannot_delete_active: PASS - Returns 400 when deleting active schedule
backend_api.list_schedules: PASS - Returns list of schedules for department
backend_api.validation_duplicate: PASS - Returns 400 for duplicate schedule creation

frontend_employee_management.schedule_status_badge: PASS - Shows 'مسودة' (draft) badge for March schedule
frontend_employee_management.approve_delete_buttons: PASS - 'اعتماد' and 'حذف' buttons visible for draft
frontend_employee_management.create_clone_buttons: PASS - 'جدول جديد' and 'نسخ من السابق' buttons for months without schedule
frontend_employee_management.rest_days_picker: PASS - RestDaysPicker with clickable pill buttons
frontend_employee_management.employee_rows: PASS - 14 employee rows rendered with data-testid='employee-row-{id}'
frontend_employee_management.shift_dropdown: PASS - Shift select dropdown in employee rows
frontend_employee_management.location_dropdown: PASS - Location select dropdown in employee rows

critical_code_review_comments: MonthBar component well-implemented with month pills navigation and status display
Backend schedule CRUD endpoints properly implemented with validation
Assignment updates work correctly with individual employee edits
Schedule status transitions (draft -> active -> archived) work correctly
Rest days picker integrated with schedule assignments for inline editing
Proper handling of months without schedules (shows create buttons)
Good data-testid coverage for all key interactive elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 tested the Monthly Employee Schedule system. Key data-testids: month-bar, month-pill-{YYYY-MM}, create-schedule-btn, clone-schedule-btn, approve-schedule-btn, delete-schedule-btn, rest-days-picker, employee-row-{id}. Schedule endpoints: GET /api/schedules/{dept}/{month}, POST /api/admin/schedules, PUT /api/admin/schedules/{id}/assignment/{emp_id}, PUT /api/admin/schedules/{id}/status?status=active, DELETE /api/admin/schedules/{id}. Planning dept has 14 employees. Draft schedule exists for 2026-03 with 14 assignments.
